title: SQL query with template literal interpolation
description: SQL query built with template literals containing interpolated values.
remediation: Use parameterized queries: db.query('SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = $1', [id])

title: SQL query with string concatenation
description: SQL query built with string concatenation operator.

title: Raw SQL in ORM without parameterization
description: ORM raw query method with interpolated values.
remediation: Use ORM's tagged template: prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = ${id}`

title: Python SQL with string formatting
description: Python SQL query built with f-strings, % formatting, or .format().
remediation: Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = %s', (id,))

title: Ruby/Rails SQL with string interpolation
description: Rails SQL query built with Ruby string interpolation.

title: MongoDB query with unsanitized user input
description: MongoDB query operators ($gt, $ne, $regex) may be injected via request body.
remediation: Validate and sanitize MongoDB query inputs. Use mongo-sanitize or explicit field extraction.
